product_overview: Mobile-first Progressive Web App for volunteers, club owners and partners to find and manage shifts, complete safety workflows, sign legal onboarding documents, and manage loyalty/rewards. The app integrates Supabase Auth, realtime updates and club-facing command/analytics tools.
core_goals: Provide frictionless volunteer onboarding and secure authentication with enforced legal signature before full access.
Offer a dynamic task marketplace allowing volunteers to discover, sign up for and manage shifts with optimistic UI updates.
Enable real-time safety workflows (SOS/incidents, checklists) that broadcast to club Command Center via realtime channels.
Deliver a digital Club Card / Wallet for check-in and loyalty/reward tracking with realtime check-in confirmation.
Expose club-facing management tools (events, planning, volunteers, analytics, billing) for operational control and reporting.

features.name: Authentication & Legal Onboarding
features.description: Sign up, login and password reset flows for volunteers and club owners. Enforce signing of the mandatory Informatienota (legal onboarding) before allowing access to core dashboard functionality.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill first name and last name -> Fill email address -> Fill password and confirm password -> Accept terms of service -> Click register button -> See confirmation toast -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See Informatienota signature modal -> Use signature pad to sign -> Click Submit signature -> See dashboard
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email address with invalid format -> Fill password and confirm password mismatch -> Click register button -> See validation errors for invalid input and password mismatch

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click login button -> See dashboard or redirect to Informatienota if signature pending -> Use signature pad to sign if prompted -> Click Submit signature -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill wrong password -> Click login button -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill email address -> Click send reset link button -> See confirmation message
Navigate to /reset-password -> Fill non-existent email address -> Click send reset link button -> See confirmation or non-specific success message (no account enumeration)

features.name: Task Marketplace (Volunteer Tasks & Sign Up)
features.description: Volunteers browse available tasks by club/date, view details, and sign up. UI must show spots available and apply partner-only visibility rules. Sign up inserts task_signups and updates UI optimistically.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click 'Mijn Taken' tab -> View list of signed-up tasks and available tasks -> Click on a task card to open details at /tasks/:id -> View task title, date, time, location and spots_available -> Click Sign Up button -> See optimistic UI change showing assigned/pending status -> See updated spots_available count

Navigate to /dashboard -> Click 'Mijn Taken' tab -> Click on a task card -> Click Sign Up button for a partner_only task while not linked to the partner -> See 'not available' / hidden or permission error message
Navigate to /my-clubs -> View list of clubs volunteer belongs to -> Click a club -> Browse available tasks for that club -> Click Sign Up button -> See task_signup created and UI updated
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click a task card -> Click Sign Up button when spots_available = 0 -> See 'full' state or error toast and no signup is created
Navigate to /tasks/:id -> Click Unsubscribe button for an assigned task -> See confirmation -> Confirm action -> See task removed from signed-up list
Navigate to /tasks/:id -> Click Sign Up button -> API returns server error -> See error toast and UI roll-back to previous state

features.name: Stadium Safety & Incident (SOS / Panic Button)
features.description: Volunteers submit incidents (SOS) with geolocation and severity. Incidents are stored and broadcast via realtime channels to the club Command Center for immediate response.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a relevant task via /tasks/:id -> Click Panic / SOS button -> Browser requests geolocation permission -> Grant geolocation permission -> App captures LAT/LNG -> Click Confirm to send incident -> See local confirmation 'Incident reported' -> Club sees realtime incident in /club-dashboard/command-center

Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a relevant task via /tasks/:id -> Click Panic / SOS button -> Browser requests geolocation permission -> Deny geolocation permission -> See error message 'Location required to report incident' -> Incident is not created

Navigate to /dashboard -> Open task checklists -> Check off a mandatory opening procedure item -> See progress saved in realtime -> Continue until checklist completion -> See 'Checklist complete' saved state
Navigate to /tasks/:id -> Click Panic / SOS button -> Grant geolocation -> Network outage occurs during submission -> See retry prompt and local cached incident queued for resend

features.name: Digital Club Card & Wallet (QR Check-in & Loyalty)
features.description: Display a scannable QR/Barcode representing user UID, show wallet balance and loyalty progress. POS scans invoke an edge function to auto-check-in and the app shows realtime 'Checked In' status and updated balances.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View personal info and displayed QR Code -> Confirm QR visually present on screen -> Simulate POS scan by calling auto_checkin_on_card_scan edge function with user UUID -> Receive realtime update showing 'Checked In' status -> See updated Wallet balance and loyalty progress in profile
Navigate to /profile -> View QR Code -> Simulate POS scan API returns 400 or network error -> See error toast 'Scan failed' and no 'Checked In' status

Navigate to /profile -> Open Wallet section -> View current accrued monetary balance and active loyalty goals -> Complete enough tasks to hit a loyalty milestone -> See loyalty goal progress update and 'Reward available' state
Navigate to /profile -> Attempt to access QR without being authenticated -> Redirect to /login -> See authentication required message

features.name: Volunteer Training / Academy
features.description: Volunteers access training modules, take quizzes and store results. Quiz completion yields a score and progress is recorded.
user_flows: Navigate to /training -> View list of training modules -> Click to open a training module -> Read module content -> Start quiz -> Answer all required questions -> Click Submit -> See quiz results and score
Navigate to /training -> Click a training module -> Start quiz -> Leave required questions unanswered -> Click Submit -> See validation errors and prevented submission
Navigate to /training -> Complete quiz -> Network error on result POST -> See 'Save failed' prompt with retry option -> Retry and succeed -> See stored quiz result

features.name: Events Manager (Club Owners)
features.description: Club owners create, edit and manage events and the task slots that belong to events. Events appear in the club events list with the ability to edit or delete.
user_flows: Navigate to /club-dashboard/events -> View list of events -> Click Create New Event -> Fill event name -> Fill date -> Fill venue -> Click Create -> See new event appear in the events list
Navigate to /club-dashboard/events -> Click on an existing event -> Click Edit -> Change date and venue -> Click Save -> See updated event details in list
Navigate to /club-dashboard/events -> Click Create New Event -> Leave required field (name) blank -> Click Create -> See validation error and event not created
Navigate to /club-dashboard/events -> Click Delete on an event -> Confirm delete -> See event removed from list and backend delete applied

tech_stack.other: Supabase Auth, React Router DOM, TanStack React Query, Framer Motion, Recharts, React Hook Form + Zod

known_limitations.issue: AnalyticsDashboard uses legacy club_members table instead of club_memberships
known_limitations.impact: Analytics data may be incomplete or empty

known_limitations.issue: ClubOwnerDashboard has duplicate init() call at lines 538-540
known_limitations.impact: Minor performance issue on dashboard load

known_limitations.issue: MonthlyPlanning uses supabase.auth.getUser() instead of useClubContext()
known_limitations.impact: Auth pattern inconsistency, may cause issues

known_limitations.issue: BillingDashboard and SeasonContractManager use manual auth calls
Self check-in feature intentionally not implemented
known_limitations.impact: Volunteers cannot check themselves in, only club staff can
